softwareserial_init.message0: Initialize soft serial port %1 RX pin %2 TX pin %3 Baud rate %4
softwareserial_init.tooltip: Create a software-simulated serial port, specify the RX (receive) and TX (transmit) pins and baud rate

softwareserial_available.message0: Soft serial port %1 buffer has data
softwareserial_available.tooltip: Returns the number of bytes that can be read in the soft serial port receive buffer

softwareserial_read.tooltip: Read data from the soft serial port. read() reads a byte, peek() checks but does not remove it, and other reads formatted data

softwareserial_print.tooltip: Output data through the soft serial port (without line breaks)

softwareserial_println.message0: Soft serial port %1 outputs %2 and wraps the line
softwareserial_println.tooltip: Output data through the soft serial port and wrap

softwareserial_write.message0: Soft serial port %1 output raw data %2
softwareserial_write.tooltip: Send raw byte data through soft serial port

softwareserial_listen.message0: Set the soft serial port %1 as the active listening port
softwareserial_listen.tooltip: Set the specified soft serial port as the active listening port. Only one soft serial port can be in monitoring state at the same time

softwareserial_islistening.tooltip: Check whether the specified soft serial port is the current active listening port

softwareserial_overflow.tooltip: Check whether the soft serial port receive buffer has overflowed (the overflow flag will be cleared after the call)

softwareserial_end.tooltip: Stop soft serial communication and release related resources
